meaning: vt.将(音素、单词等)置于上下文中研究 (通过介绍来龙去脉) 使(事件、 活动等) 溶入背景
examples: But there's still a need to contextualize some of this information.
In addition to storing data, we must also be able to contextualize it.
In order to intelligently manage user data, we have to contextualize it; and for this we use scopes.
RealPlayer is the "advertiser, " if we were to re-contextualize this deal in terms of content publishing.
Video Albums contextualize users' video stories and are a brand-new way to simultaneously share collections of videos.
